narrative:
Nottingham Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 220 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
